blocking_issues.resolution: User must run manually: rm -rf /root/application-assistant/null/ && rm /root/application-assistant/education_details /root/application-assistant/experience_details /root/application-assistant/projects /root/application-assistant/skills

blocking_issues.issue: data/education_details does not exist in data/ directory
blocking_issues.impact: Root-level education_details has no confirmed canonical duplicate in data/. Deleting it removes it from the repo entirely.
blocking_issues.resolution: User should confirm whether education_details can be safely deleted before running the rm command above

recommendations: MANUAL COMMANDS REQUIRED: 4 repos have workflow UUID files still tracked due to pretool-bash-safety.sh blocking git rm --cached. User must run the commands listed in blocking_issues for knowledge-system-qijie, multi-asset-portfolio, and travel-planner.
application-assistant: Confirm education_details deletion intent, then run the rm commands in blocking_issues.
multi-asset-portfolio: Clean up 8 qa-*.png files from disk (already untracked from index): rm /root/multi-asset-portfolio/qa-*.png
happy: yarn.lock should be regenerated after bun.lock and package-lock.json removal — run yarn install in /root/happy.
excel-analyzer: Consider broadening workflow-current.json to workflow-*.json (wildcard) consistent with other repos.

All repos: No commits made — orchestrator should coordinate commits per-repo once manual steps are complete. Suggested message template: 'chore(<repo>): untrack transient files and fix .gitignore patterns'
Root cause is systemic: .gitignore rules added after initial commits, git rm --cached not run. All repos now have correct patterns; the index cleanup completes the fix.

pretool-bash-safety.sh hook pattern for workflow files is a false positive for git rm --cached (which does not delete from disk). Consider adding an exception or a dedicated untrack permission for git rm --cached on workflow files.
